name: Member with no active loyalty promotions (gate OFF)
description: Control case: a logged-in member who currently qualifies for nothing. loyaltyPromotions is empty, so session.custom.loyaltyPromotions is set to '' — no Dynamic Customer Group activates, and the shopper sees list prices with no loyalty badges. Use this to prove the gate is closed by default.
notes: SFRA should still write the (empty) attribute so a prior session's codes are cleared on re-login: session.custom.loyaltyPromotions = (body.loyaltyPromotions || []).join(',').
